title: helichrysum asperum var. albidulum
intro: Helichrysum asperum var. albidulum, commonly known as White Ghost or Ghost Helichrysum, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Helichrysum asperum var. albidulum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant's essential oil is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as aromatherapy, topical applications, and infusions, to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and alleviate various health issues.
